reviews.comment:
Solia ser una parada obligada en mis viajes a Rosario, del comienzo de la pandemia a esta parte rara vez les "funciona" la YPF en ruta. Solia haber cola para ingresar. últimamente esta siempre vacia. Por algo sera.....

(Translated by Google)
It used to be a must-stop on my trips to Rosario, but since the start of the pandemic, the YPF gas station on the highway rarely seems to be working. There used to be a line to get in; lately, it's always empty. There must be a reason...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcFlXQkFREAE

reviews.comment:
El servicio de playa ok, atención de personal del MiniMarket ok. El café para llevar es chico, una miseria por lo que cobran, las medialunas horribles. Lástima porque la comida casera del lugar es rica, sabrosa y abundante.

(Translated by Google)
The beach service was okay, and the staff at the MiniMarket were fine. The takeaway coffee is small and ridiculously cheap for what they charge, and the croissants were awful. It's a shame because the homemade food there is delicious, tasty, and plentiful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHbWVXUzN3RRAB
